image_prompt: SVG: radioactive decay curve, Activity / Bq (0-1100, ticks every 100, minor 20) vs Time / minutes (0-60, ticks every 10, minor 2), smooth exponential falling from 1000 Bq with half-life = 18.5 min (500 Bq at 18.5 min).

SVG: three cooling curves, Temperature / °C (8.0-22.0, ticks every 2, minor 0.5) vs Time / s (0-60, ticks every 10, minor 2). Cooking oil flat near 20.6°C (orange); Water smooth decay to plateau ~14.8°C (teal); Ethanol dips to minimum ~9.8°C near 18-20 s, plateaus, then recovers to ~14°C (magenta). Key included.

SVG: four scatter panels A-D, Maximum height reached / m (0-6, ticks every 1, minor 0.5) vs Angle / degrees (0-90, ticks every 10, minor 5). Identical data with a 30° outlier (point at 30°,3.0 sits below trend); A=straight best-fit line; B=concave-down parabola (flat left, steep right); C=kinked dot-to-dot polyline through all points; D=smooth S best-fit that flattens at top-left and bottom-right and ignores the outlier (the correct choice). Height at 0° ~5.1 m, angle at height 0 ~82°.

topic: Sex ratio at birth vs year
image_prompt: SVG: line graph, Sex ratio at birth (100-108, ticks every 1, minor 0.5) vs Year (1960-2000, ticks every 5, minor 1). Flat near 105.3 from 1960-1975 then rising smoothly to ~107.7 by 2000, points joined by a smooth curve with dot markers.
